name: Eita Kidou
description: The main character and a first year high school student. He aims to attend medical school after graduating from high school. Eita is very smart and always places at the top of the class during term exams. He doesn't like romance and love, as he calls himself "anti-romance." However, there is a reason for this: his parents divorced to search for 'the real one' and left him alone, never appearing before him again. This is why he lives with his aunt, Saeko-san.

name: Felix Ridill
nativeName: フェリクス・アーク・リディル
description: __Height:__ 161.8 cm The second prince of the Kingdom of Ridill. He is a third-year student in the high school division of Serendia Academy, one of the most prestigious schools in the Kingdom of Ridill, and serves as student council president. His maternal grandfather is Duke Crockford, one of the most powerful men in the country. He is embroiled in a battle for the throne to become the next king of the Kingdom of Ridill, and is frequently targeted by assassins. His handsome looks and refined in

name: Gamatatsu
description: Gamatatsu (ガマ竜; Literally meaning "Toad Dragon") is one of Gamabunta's children and Gamakichi's younger brother who has a fixation with snacks. Gamatatsu has shown that he'd choose snacks over someone's life. When Naruto is injured while fighting with Kabuto Yakushi, he replies, "Hey Gamakichi, do we have to wait for the kid to croak till we get snacks, cuz' I'm getting hungry". Although in the filler arcs Gamatatsu showed that he does care about Naruto's life as he was ready to rescue him befor

name: Gluttony
description: Gluttony is the second homunculus to appear in the series, typically being in the company of Lust. He is a large, simple-minded homunculus whose thoughts rarely stray far from eating. He has powerful jaws, acidic saliva, and can and will eat almost anything. He particularly likes eating people, and the only way he can find enjoyment in a battle is if he believes he can eat his opponent afterwards. A running gag in the manga and anime is asking Lust (or any other Homunculi) if he can eat someone.

name: Gokuraku Kagami
description: Infamously known as Gokuraku the Brutalizer, he is one of the main members of Team Desscaras as their Special Adjunct. Gokuraku is an augmented human and a notorious criminal in the land of Kagami for repeatedly attempting to kill slumbering Majik Bakugami. He is officially listed as a dangerous individual by the Mantinel Witches Association due to his relentless and violent attempts to acquire Majiks. He wishes to become a witch to acquire Bakugami, and so he challenges and beats up any Majik h

name: Gourry Gabriev
nativeName: ガウリイ・ガブリエフ
description: Gourry is a wandering swordsman who meets up with Lina in the first episode of the television series. He accompanies her from then on. He carries the fabled Sword of Light, originally known as Gorun Nova before it came to the Slayers world. Gourry is somewhat less than scholarly and appears to have serious memory deficit along with ADD, but his skills as a swordsman are unmatched throughout the franchise. A characterization of Gourry from his manga profile is "as loyal as man's best friend but n
searchTerms: ガウリイ・ガブリエフ

name: Haa-chan
description: Haa-chan is a baby-like fairy who appears in Mahoutsukai Precure!. She comes from the Linkle Smartbook and it is a mystery as to why she comes from it. She acts a lot like a normal toddler, always wanting to play and getting rather moody when things don't go her way. She can get rather sleepy after eating or drinking something and goes back into the Linkle Smartbook for rest. ~!Ha-chan grows up into a young girl during episode 21.!~ ~!In episode 22, she debuts as her alter ego, Cure Felice, the

name: Hajun Yeon
description: __Height:__ 185 cm Born in one of the most prominent financial conglomerate family in Korea. Due to his demeanor and looks, he was nicknamed 'Smiling Young Noble', but he is actually quite sadistic in nature. Because he was born in a complicated environment swirling in conflicting interests and ulterior motives, he lived half of his life very fiercely and swore to take revenge on both of his parents in his heart.

name: Hiroki Kamijou
description: Hiroki is 28. He is the professor’s Miyagi assistant in the classical literature department of University. Formerly a childhood friend of Usami, he used to be madly in love until the day his path crosses Nowaki. Hiroki has a very passionate personality. He is a loner yet extremely temperamental. His students complain about how he does not hesitate to throw things at them when they are not paying attention in class.

name: Hiroshi Agasa
description: Hiroshi Agasa is an inventor and Shinichi's next-door neighbor. He makes his living with a wide number of patents and inventions, including video games _(of which the Detective Boys are enthusiastic test players)._ While many of his inventions are useless or have even damaged his in-house research laboratory, Agasa has been successful enough to live in a large house and even rebuild it when necessary. He has been a friend of Shinichi and [Ran](https://anilist.co/character/1748/Ran-Mouri) since t
mediaTitles: Case Closed: The Time Bombed Skyscraper

name: Ishii
description: Woman with glasses who repaired Chito's and Yuri's vehicle and asked for help with plane construction in exchange. The last pilot in history. Like Yuuri, Ishii is also left-handed.

name: Jousuke Tsunami
description: Jousuke Tsunami is a surfer who lived in the South Seas in Japan, specifically Okinawa. He is completely passionate about the sea. When he meets the team Inazuma Eleven discover the wonders of football, and he ends up being a player whose team is later defeated by them. After some confusion with the Aliea Academy, Tsunami officially joins the Inazuma Caravan. His special techniques are: [Season two] Tsunami Boost and the Perfect Tower (with Touko and Kogure) [Season three] The Typhoon and The Tu
mediaTitles: Inazuma Eleven GO vs Danball Senki W

name: Jun Guevara
description: In the 'Son of Ogre' series, an 'alternative universe' version of the famous Che Guevara exists. This Jun Guevara is a former pirate of the high seas who went on to found his own sovereign nation of 'La Serna'. His appearance is nearly identical to the real Guevara as seen in the classic photograph, and he is one of the three strongest men in the entire world, along with Biscuit Oliva and Yujiro Hanma. Much like the real-life version, this manga version of Guevara is notorious for his radical po

name: Kanako Sumiyoshi
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Junpei Kousaka's childhood friend, until a misunderstanding happened over a friendship doll she made for him, she had believed he gave it away. However, he was just showing it around. After this incident, she had a strong rivalry with Junpei, and her sense of style changed (she wore abnormally dark make-up) but in the end, after a cat asked Junpei to thank the girl who had cared for him she went back to having a friendly relationship... Sort of. A running gag is the fact that

name: Keiji Nagatsuka
description: Kurosawa's friend. He was the first person to socialize with him in school. He is an otaku. ~!He later becomes Takigawa's boyfriend, which makes Kurosawa avoid him. After Kurosawa's confession and during the intense bullying he was enduring due to his confession, Keiji was the first classmate to start talking to him and help him through those tough times.!~

name: Kengo Miyazawa
description: __Height:__ 180 cm Kengo is a member of the Little Busters. He is skilled in the art of kendo and has a cynical personality, but his passion for the Little Busters is unmatched by anyone. ~!In the artificial world, he supports Kyousuke's plan to strengthen both Riki and Rin to overcome the events in the real world. He saves Rin during the bus accident.!~

name: Kou Yukina
description: **Height:** 186 cm Yukina is a clerk in charge of the shoujo manga section at the bookstore, Marimo books. He's been aware of Kisa coming in to watch him, but when he finds out Kisa is the editor behind all of his favorite works he begins to develop feelings for him. He's willing to fight to make Kisa understand that what they feel for each other is real. And that Kisa is able to actually fall in love.

name: Livia de Udis
nativeName: リヴィア・ド・ウーディス
description: A knight from another world who serves as an aide to [Sara](https://anilist.co/character/318361/Odin-Sara). After being transported to modern-day Japan in pursuit of Sara, she becomes homeless. Through her overwhelming mental and physical strength, she manages to make the best of her situation.

name: Maya Amano
description: __Height:__ 168 cm Maya is a reporter for the teen magazine "Coolest." She is a very optimistic and cheerful young woman, whose motto is "Let's Positive Thinking!" (Engrish for its American counterpart, "Let's Be Positive!"). Maya became a journalist because of her late father, a war correspondent who was killed during a conflict. Her goal is to successfully balance work and family, in contrast to her father, who became distant from his wife and daughter. In reality, however, Maya is firmly comm

name: Mayuko Shiraki
description: Mayuko Shiraki (白木 繭子, Shiraki Mayuko) is Tohru, Kyo, Yuki, Saki, and Arisa's homeroom teacher; what subject she teaches is never given, though in an author's note, Natsuki Takaya said she thinks Shiraki fits the image of a literature teacher. name: Mei Tatebayashi
description: **Height:** 165 cm (5'5") A waitress at the "Question" café. Someone who slowly comes to terms with more and more of her identity from an "otokonoko" to a transgender woman.
mediaTitles: Love Me for Who I Am
searchTerms: Love Me for Who I Am

name: Miharu Rokujo
description: __Height:__ 157 cm Rokujo is a middle school student. He holds Nabari's hijutsu, the 'Shinra banshō', in his body. He pretends to act indifferent to those around him in order to protect them from getting hurt, though he is not averse to acting in a rather innocent and cute way in order to get what he wants. He remembers little of his childhood, and had lost his parents at a young age. His only goal is to help Yoite to grant his wish.

name: Mika Shimotsuki
description: She is a student of Oso Girl's Academy who seems to be aware of what's going on around campus. She is Kagami's friend and classmate. ~!She becomes an inspector, working with Akane Tsunemori as the new junior inspector, with a first day on the job mirroring Tsunemori's own first day.!~

name: Mizuka Sonohara
description: She is one of the 7 Legendary Red Barons, known as the "Pursuit Baron".
